description: A cognitive psychology instructor has collected Go/No-Go (GNG) task data from 25 undergraduate students and one corrupted record at ~/pebl/data/gng_data.csv. Analyze the dataset to compute Omission Errors (GO trials with response=0), Commission Errors (NOGO trials with response=1), Hit Rate (GO response=1 / Total GO), False Alarm Rate (NOGO response=1 / Total NOGO), Mean Hit RT (mean rt_ms for GO trials where response=1), and d-prime (Z(Hit Rate) - Z(False Alarm Rate)) for each participant. Apply Signal Detection Theory (SDT) corrections for rates of 0 or 1 using the 0.5/N adjustment. Exclude participants with a False Alarm Rate ≥ 0.90 and Mean Hit RT < 100 ms. Generate a report at ~/pebl/analysis/gng_report.json containing a 'participants' list with individual metrics (id, omission_errors, commission_errors, hit_rate, false_alarm_rate, mean_hit_rt_ms, d_prime) or an 'excluded' flag with a reason, and a 'group_means' dictionary with averages for all six metrics across valid participants.

metadata.data_source: Simulated from empirical OpenNeuro GNG parameters
